list5.Discernible: able to be perceived by a sense (such as sight or smell) or by the mind : capable of being discerned
list5.Spectral: of, relating to, or suggesting a specter : ghostly
list5.Juncture: a point of time; especially : one made critical by a concurrence of circumstances
list5.Mottled: marked with spots of different colors : having blotches of two or more colors
list5.Stifle: to withhold from circulation or expression
list5.Edifice: building; especially : a large or massive structure
list5.Perturbed: troubled in mind : feeling or showing agitation : bothered, upset
